---
title: "Natalie Annett"
image: "nat.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/natalie-annett-a94238194/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/na22010"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:annettwannisa@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
## Bio

As part of my degree requirement, I have been developing my quantitative analysis skills through R and I will be showing my progress in my final year project - a policy report - by producing a regression table. The activities I have done in previous assignments will demonstrate the development of my skills.

## Education

**University of Essex** | Colchester, UK

BSc Politics and International Relations | October 2022 - Present
